demo.title: deploy.sh
demo.code:
# Always fork with --network, never yarn chain
yarn fork --network base
# Chain ID inside fork: use chains.foundry (31337), not 8453
# Enable block mining or transactions hang
cast rpc anvil_setIntervalMining 1

# IPFS build (Node 25+ needs localStorage polyfill)
yarn build

# ENS subdomain — 2 transactions
# 1. Set contenthash on your ENS name
# 2. Set text record pointing to IPFS hash
